title: Baseconnect Expo Android can log in with the staging bot
description: Runs the worker-local Android staging login script with the worker-local staging bot auth file, attaches the default agent-device session, and verifies the app is on a normal in-app surface instead of an error overlay.
command:
set -euo pipefail
source "{{authEnvPath}}"
verify_ready_once() {
  agent-device appstate --platform android --session default --json | grep -q 'com.baseconnect.baseconnect'
  adb shell uiautomator dump /sdcard/window.xml >/dev/null 2>&1
  adb exec-out cat /sdcard/window.xml >/tmp/baseconnect-health-android-window.xml
  ! grep -q 'Uncaught Error' /tmp/baseconnect-health-android-window.xml
  NODE_COUNT=$(grep -o '<node ' /tmp/baseconnect-health-android-window.xml | wc -l | tr -d ' ')
  [ "${NODE_COUNT}" -ge 20 ]
  grep -q 'text="Feed"' /tmp/baseconnect-health-android-window.xml
  grep -q 'text="Search"' /tmp/baseconnect-health-android-window.xml
  ! grep -q 'text="Username"' /tmp/baseconnect-health-android-window.xml
  ! grep -q 'text="Log In"' /tmp/baseconnect-health-android-window.xml
  adb shell screencap -p /sdcard/baseconnect-health-android-screen.png >/dev/null 2>&1
  adb pull /sdcard/baseconnect-health-android-screen.png /tmp/baseconnect-health-android-screen.png >/dev/null 2>&1
  SCREEN_SIZE=$(wc -c </tmp/baseconnect-health-android-screen.png | tr -d ' ')
  [ "${SCREEN_SIZE}" -ge 60000 ]
}
verify_ready() {
  verify_ready_once
  sleep 2
  verify_ready_once
}
export AGENT_DEVICE_SESSION_NAME="default"
if verify_ready; then
  exit 0
fi
cd "{{targetPath}}"
export OUT_DIR="/tmp/baseconnect-health-android"
./scripts/start_logged_in_expo_android_staging.sh >/tmp/baseconnect-health-android.log 2>&1
verify_ready
